creator: freebsd-prs@brettglass.com
text:
Bjoern:

Compile error appears to have been fixed in RC2. Only remaining concern is
the incredibly confusing, nested "spaghetti #ifdefs" in that file. The should
be cleaned up, even if it requires copying some snippets of code into multiple
#ifdef blocks, so that future contributors don't inadvertently break things as
more work is done on IPv6 and more people create IPv6-only hosts.

--Brett Glass

At 07:11 AM 11/26/2011, Bjoern A. Zeeb wrote:

>Is this till a probem with with the later RC builds or can it be
>closed?
>
>/bz
>
>--
>Bjoern A. Zeeb                                 You have to have visions!
>          Stop bit received. Insert coin for new address family.
